{{Infobox location
| name = Forge (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The forge has obsidian walls and anvils of various sizes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Tartarus Incarnation]] knocked the door to the forge off its hinges.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The forge is a location the giant enters.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
